on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate
on-error-propagate.type: SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY, SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT, SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE, SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED, SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED, SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND, SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED, SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT

logger.doc:name: Salesforce Error Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorType: error.errorType.identifier default 'UNKNOWN_SALESFORCE_ERROR', errorCategory: 'SALESFORCE', correlationId: vars.correlationId default '', transactionId: vars.transactionId default '', timestamp: now() as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'}, description: error.description default 'Unknown Salesforce error', detailedDescription: error.detailedDescription default '', eventType: vars.eventType default 'UNKNOWN' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if(!isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload) and !isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.errorOrigin)) error.errorMessage.payload else { "messages": if(error.cause.errorMessage.payload.messages != null) (error.cause.errorMessage.payload.messages) else error.description, "errorOrigin": p('application.name'), "status": "ERROR", "code": error.errorType.asString default error.errorMessage.attributes.statusCode, "description": error.detailedDescription, "correlationId": vars.correlationId default "", "timestamp": now() >> "America/Chicago" as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"}, "outputPayload": payload default "" }

on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate
on-error-propagate.type: HTTP:BAD_GATEWAY, HTTP:BAD_REQUEST, HTTP:CLIENT_SECURITY, HTTP:CONNECTIVITY, HTTP:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, HTTP:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED, HTTP:NOT_ACCEPTABLE, HTTP:RETRY_EXHAUSTED, HTTP:SECURITY, HTTP:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, HTTP:TIMEOUT, HTTP:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS, HTTP:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE, STREAM_MAXIMUM_SIZE_EXCEEDED

logger.doc:name: HTTP Error Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorType: error.errorType.identifier default 'UNKNOWN_HTTP_ERROR', errorCategory: 'HTTP', correlationId: vars.correlationId default '', transactionId: vars.transactionId default '', timestamp: now() as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'}, description: error.description default 'Unknown HTTP error', detailedDescription: error.detailedDescription default '', statusCode: error.errorMessage.attributes.statusCode default 'UNKNOWN', eventType: vars.eventType default 'UNKNOWN', targetSystem: p('target') default 'UNKNOWN' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if(!isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload) and !isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.errorOrigin)) error.errorMessage.payload else { "messages": if(error.cause.errorMessage.payload.messages != null) (error.cause.errorMessage.payload.messages) else error.description, "errorOrigin": p('application.name'), "status": "ERROR", "code": error.errorType.asString default error.errorMessage.attributes.statusCode, "description": error.detailedDescription, "correlationId": vars.correlationId default "", "timestamp": now() >> "America/Chicago" as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"}, "outputPayload": payload default "" }

logger.doc:name: Object Store Error Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorType: error.errorType.identifier default 'UNKNOWN_OBJECTSTORE_ERROR', errorCategory: 'OBJECTSTORE', correlationId: vars.correlationId default '', transactionId: vars.transactionId default '', timestamp: now() as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'}, description: error.description default 'Object Store error', detailedDescription: error.detailedDescription default '', eventType: vars.eventType default 'UNKNOWN', key: error.exception.info.key default 'UNKNOWN_KEY' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "messages": "Object Store error: " ++ (error.description default "Unknown error"), "errorOrigin": p('application.name'), "status": "ERROR", "code": error.errorType.asString, "description": "Failed to access Object Store mapping. Key: " ++ (error.exception.info.key default "unknown"), "correlationId": vars.correlationId default "", "timestamp": now() >> "America/Chicago" as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"}, "outputPayload": null }

on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate
on-error-propagate.type: HL7:CONNECTIVITY, HL7:PARSE, HL7:SCHEMA, HL7:RETRY_EXHAUSTED, HL7:UNKNOWN, HL7:WRITE

logger.doc:name: HL7 Error Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorType: error.errorType.identifier default 'UNKNOWN_HL7_ERROR', errorCategory: 'HL7', correlationId: vars.correlationId default '', transactionId: vars.transactionId default '', timestamp: now() as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'}, description: error.description default 'HL7 message error', detailedDescription: error.detailedDescription default '', eventType: vars.eventType default 'UNKNOWN' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "messages": "HL7 error: " ++ (error.description default "Unknown error"), "errorOrigin": p('application.name'), "status": "ERROR", "code": error.errorType.asString, "description": error.detailedDescription default "HL7 message processing failed", "correlationId": vars.correlationId default "", "timestamp": now() >> "America/Chicago" as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"}, "outputPayload": null }

logger.doc:name: General Error Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorType: error.errorType.identifier default 'UNKNOWN_ERROR', errorCategory: error.errorType.namespace default 'GENERAL', correlationId: vars.correlationId default '', transactionId: vars.transactionId default '', timestamp: now() as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'}, description: error.description default 'Unknown error', detailedDescription: error.detailedDescription default '', eventType: vars.eventType default 'UNKNOWN', stackTrace: error.cause.stackTrace default '' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "messages": error.description default "Unknown error", "errorOrigin": p('application.name'), "status": "ERROR", "code": error.errorType.asString default "GENERAL_ERROR", "description": error.detailedDescription default error.description default "Unknown error occurred", "correlationId": vars.correlationId default "", "timestamp": now() >> "America/Chicago" as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"}, "outputPayload": null }

logger.message: ERROR HANDLER EXIT - errorType: #[error.errorType default 'UNKNOWN'], message: #[error.description default 'No description'], payload: #[payload]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- "[" ++ upper(p('mule.env') default "UNKNOWN") ++ "] " ++ "NextGen-Salesforce Integration Error: " ++ (error.errorType.identifier default "UNKNOWN") ++ " in " ++ (p('application.name') default "unknown")

logger.doc:name: Mail Start Log
logger.message: CorrelationId: #[vars.correlationId default "NONE"] - Sending Error Email to Support Team

logger.doc:name: Mail End Log
logger.message: CorrelationId: #[vars.correlationId default "NONE"] - Error Email sent successfully
